columns.extraction_plan: The document reports "Time to CRPC" (Time to Castration-Resistant Prostate Cancer) as a secondary efficacy endpoint, which is a measure of progression. For the "Overall" group in the Darolutamide arm, the median "Time to CRPC" is "NR" (Not Reached). This can be found on page 8, in Table 2, under the row "Time to CRPC" and the column "Darolutamide (n=651)".
